context: Task #9 iter 1 smoke test — notion envelope DB-only rewrite based on #1178 HAR evidence (engine OFF). Old envelope emitted compose_response/final_answer NDJSON frames (architecturally wrong — notion FE never renders that path). New envelope (HAR-driven) emits a single application/x-ndjson record-map frame containing a thread_message whose step.type=agent-inference with value[0].type=text + value[0].content=<warning>. Macros: {{REQUEST_BODY:spaceId/threadId/traceId}} echo c2s body, {{UUID:msg}}/{{UUID:user}} synthesize IDs, {{ESCAPE2:MESSAGE}} carries the warning text. Headers: Content-Type: application/x-ndjson, Content-Encoding: identity, CORS Allow-Origin + Allow-Credentials. Single-frame terminal — record-map is the FE's commit signal.
notes: PASS criteria: chat bubble renders '차단' Korean warning text. Old behavior was NDJSON parse failure (#330) due to wrong frame shape. Network tab should show 200 OK with Content-Type application/x-ndjson and a single line containing 'agent-inference' record-map. Mirror m365 iter 5 (commit dc5ab63) HAR-driven pattern.
